title: Armed Actors – Philippines
summary: Multiple armed groups active across Mindanao and the Visayas. Key actors include MILF/Bangsamoro government forces, NPA, Abu Sayyaf, and BIFF.

title: CVE, CT & Stabilization – Somalia
summary: Al-Shabaab operates as both an insurgency and a shadow government across South Central Somalia. Covers CVE program design, stabilization operations, humanitarian access in AS-controlled areas, and defector reintegration.

title: Sahel – Armed Actors
summary: Jihadist insurgencies, inter-community violence, and coup-related instability across Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger.

title: Myanmar – Internal Conflict
summary: Post-coup armed resistance, ethnic armed organizations, and humanitarian access constraints across multiple fronts.
